title: Provide Audit Record Reduction and Report Generation
description: Provide audit record reduction and report generation to support on-demand analysis and reporting.

checks.name: Audit Log Filtering or Querying Capability Exists
checks.purpose: Verify the system has a mechanism to filter and query audit logs (e.g., Event Viewer custom views, PowerShell Get-WinEvent, or SIEM queries)

checks.name: Logs Can Be Exported for Reporting
checks.purpose: Confirm audit logs can be exported in a structured format (CSV, EVTX, JSON) for offline analysis and report generation

checks.name: Audit Log Filtering or Querying Capability Exists
checks.purpose: Verify the system has a mechanism to filter and query audit logs (e.g., Event Viewer custom views, PowerShell Get-WinEvent, or SIEM queries)

checks.name: Logs Can Be Exported for Reporting
checks.purpose: Confirm audit logs can be exported in a structured format (CSV, EVTX, JSON) for offline analysis and report generation

checks.name: SIEM Provides On-Demand Report Generation
checks.purpose: Verify the connected SIEM or log platform supports saved searches, dashboards, and scheduled reports for audit data

checks.name: Ausearch and Aureport Tools are Available
checks.purpose: Verify ausearch and aureport binaries are installed and functional for on-demand audit log querying and report generation

checks.name: Audit Logs Can Be Queried by User, Time, and Event Type
checks.purpose: Confirm ausearch supports filtering by auid, timestamp, and syscall to produce targeted audit reports

checks.name: SIEM or Log Platform Supports On-Demand Reporting
checks.purpose: Verify the connected SIEM or log aggregator supports saved queries and report generation from forwarded audit data

checks.name: Ausearch and Aureport Tools are Available
checks.purpose: Verify ausearch and aureport binaries are installed and functional for on-demand audit log querying and report generation

checks.name: Audit Logs Can Be Queried by User, Time, and Event Type
checks.purpose: Confirm ausearch supports filtering by auid, timestamp, and syscall to produce targeted audit reports

checks.name: SIEM or Log Platform Supports On-Demand Reporting
checks.purpose: Verify the connected SIEM or log aggregator supports saved queries and report generation from forwarded audit data

remediation: Install audit-tools package (ausearch, aureport) on Linux. Configure SIEM dashboards and saved reports. Ensure Windows audit logs can be queried via PowerShell or Event Viewer custom views. Establish a process for on-demand audit report generation.
